summary: DiskWise now shows an animated Dock icon while scanning, and What's New loads curated release notes for every version.
introduced: Animated Dock tile during drive scans — switches from the normal icon to a scanning indicator with progress
Curated What's New pages loaded from release-notes JSON for versions without hand-built tour pages
changed: Release notes sync into the app bundle at build time so in-app What's New stays up to date
